title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
